ios.label: Stable Public Release
ios.note: Uniform global public rollout across all generation lines.

ios.label: Apple 27 Beta Pipeline
ios.note: Addresses the next generational shift featuring Liquid Glass interface frameworks.

platformCompatibilityNotes.ios: iOS 26.5.2 for stable consumer configurations. iOS 27 tracks available via Beta Profiles.
platformCompatibilityNotes.macos: macOS 26.5.2 Tahoe on stable production channels. macOS 27 Golden Gate is active on Apple Silicon systems for beta participants.
platformCompatibilityNotes.ipados: iPadOS 26.5.2 for broad deployment; iPadOS 27 features enhanced multi-tasking workflows.
platformCompatibilityNotes.watchos: watchOS 26.5 stable baseline; watchOS 27 available for compatible testing units.
platformCompatibilityNotes.tvos: tvOS 26.5 production release; tvOS 27 developer channel open.
platformCompatibilityNotes.visionos: visionOS 26.5 public baseline; visionOS 27 features expanded spatial environment profiles.
